title: Input table silently replaced
root_cause: Raw count values are replaced without explicit provenance updates.
conventional_bottleneck: The change is often noticed only after downstream plots/tables diverge; root-cause search is manual and slow.
injection_note: Input values replaced and downstream objects recomputed.
baseline_issue: Output drift is visible, but root-cause tracing is manual across scripts/files.

title: Input schema/type drift
root_cause: Input field type/shape changes and downstream summaries no longer match previous output semantics.
conventional_bottleneck: Schema drift can pass silently when code coerces types; impact is discovered late.
baseline_issue: Output drift is visible, but root-cause tracing is manual across scripts/files.

title: Analysis parameter changed
root_cause: Filtering threshold is altered between runs without clear audit trail.
conventional_bottleneck: Parameter provenance is dispersed across scripts/notebooks and difficult to compare.
injection_note: Analysis parameter threshold changed and outputs recomputed.
baseline_issue: Output drift is visible, but root-cause tracing is manual across scripts/files.

title: Critical intermediate removed or overwritten
root_cause: A key derived artifact is removed/replaced during iterative analysis.
conventional_bottleneck: Recovery depends on ad-hoc backups or rerunning large sections manually.
baseline_issue: Output drift is visible, but root-cause tracing is manual across scripts/files.

title: Git provenance context missing
root_cause: Execution occurs outside a valid Git repository context.
conventional_bottleneck: Code state at analysis time cannot be reconstructed reliably.
injection_note: Repro context moved to non-git directory.
baseline_issue: Issue is often unnoticed until audit/review because no automatic provenance check exists.

title: renv lockfile missing
root_cause: Package lockfile is absent, so package versions cannot be pinned mechanically.
conventional_bottleneck: Environment reconstruction relies on manual package history and memory.
injection_note: Repro context moved to git-only directory without renv.lock.
baseline_issue: Issue is often unnoticed until audit/review because no automatic provenance check exists.
